last_validation.notes: Validator passed after completing task 074 same-file exclusion sequencing: task 019 now executes after task 009 and before task 010, task 010 depends on task 019, and task 020 depends on tasks 018 and 019. Python validator compilation passed.

history.notes: Repository docs and initial sequential task files were created; implementation has not started.
Added queue/status JSON state for autonomous agents.
Added first-class AI-agent pipeline docs, handoff/context/verification policies, and sequential task specs 040-049.

Resolved stale follow-up references, registered pipeline schema contracts, synchronized task Markdown scopes with queue.json, and added concrete tasks through release acceptance; later insertions extended the preimplementation and follow-up task set.
Added zentinel-specific GLOSSARY, NON_GOALS, INVARIANTS, HARNESS, DISCIPLINE, STYLE, FAILURE_MODES, ADR system, and docs-to-tests gap registries inspired by Kumo's autonomous-agent setup.
Added Codex-only .agents operating layer with orchestrator contract, role profiles, and workflow runbooks; no .claude directory should be added to zentinel.

Clarified stale task-state wording, TOML subset parsing, check command ownership, Zig version source, future CLI command behavior, test discovery, JUnit, CI entrypoint, runner argv policy, AI context schema strength, preview mutator backlog treatment, and backlog audit task semantics.

Clarified shared command parser ownership across tasks 005 and 014, replaced invalid AI context placeholders with complete nested examples, split Phase 0 CLI ownership across tasks 001/002/005, added explicit nested harness fixture scope, specified JUnit status mapping, separated backend_stability from operator_stability in report and AI schemas, and renamed task 025 file to match its backlog-audit purpose.
Documented that the repository scaffold is tracked as the baseline project state and that future agents may use git status to identify changes made after that baseline.

Resolved additional implementation ambiguity around task 002 init test ownership, command-parser grammar and diagnostics, report baseline semantics, structured command evidence, strict test-selection metadata, AI prompt/doctest response schema registry entries, and roadmap phase-vs-queue interpretation.

Resolved another deep-analysis pass: pipeline artifacts now have a task-scoped exception, JSON handoffs are canonical, schema ownership is validator-checked, doctest and AI examples are schema-valid, report command evidence is stricter, baseline skipping is reserved, cache diagnostics are reserved under diagnostics.cache, CLI option ownership is explicit, and prose-only follow-ups became concrete queued task metadata later extended through task 067.

Applied follow-up fixes from deep analysis: task execution order now supports inserted prerequisites without renumbering stable IDs, release acceptance is the final non-superseded order task, report and AI context schemas share per-command result evidence, doctest diagnostics own documented error codes, Zig version policy examples avoid stale release numbers, and pipeline verification artifacts include report.json.

Applied the doctest AI product decision and deep-analysis fixes: user-facing doctest AI CLI subcommands, doctest --mutate output format ownership, AI report/provider/ref semantics, report run-level schema conditionals, lifecycle state split, dependency-ready agent wording, escaped mutator tables, standard-library schema subset scope for pipeline metadata, and validator guardrails for these contracts.

Applied another deep-analysis fix set before implementation: doctest case refs now distinguish durable dt_ IDs from source selectors, doctest suggest can run without a report, doctest explain reuses the AI explain response schema, AI/doctest failure codes are specific, config exclude defaults are exact, display_id is report-local, test selection preserves config command order, roadmap and acceptance criteria include doctest AI CLI subcommands, task 006 evidence wording matches quiet command examples, and task 016 allows run-command JSON snapshots.

Applied follow-up contract fixes: duplicate unlabeled identical doctest cases are invalid instead of receiving occurrence IDs, source refs resolve only anchor lines with secondary block_refs retained for diagnostics, the shared AI explain response enum includes doctest classifications, AI/doctest failures have failure-mode and gap-registry rows, remote AI config and CLI override errors are explicitly separated, AI redaction defaults are exact, and validator guardrails preserve these contracts.

Applied doctest AI/report contract refinements: ai.prompt.v1 context ownership now separates mutation and doctest context schemas, task 055 may update the prompt schema for doctest context, doctest review-snapshot is a first-class CLI subcommand, doctest AI context/suggest/snapshot response schema targets are exact, doctest.report.v1 has concrete run/summary/case/evidence/failure fields, doctest AI output is not persisted by default, and docs/DOCTEST_AI_INTEGRATION.md is included in public-doc doctest coverage.

Resolved deep-analysis and external-agent findings: added compiler_crash as a distinct deterministic status, tightened Zig build-cache and parallel workspace isolation, constrained allocator mutators to injected target allocator wrappers, made doctest report case kinds and snapshot evidence exact, documented row-scoped gap-registry updates, and inserted task 067 for user-facing doctest survivor AI CLI assistance before release acceptance.

Resolved follow-up findings from deep analysis and the external agent: task 061 now owns docs/DOCTEST_SPEC.md alongside the doctest report schema, ds_ survivor refs have deterministic derivation and resolution rules, task 055 creates only non-survivor doctest AI context flows while task 067 adds explain_doctest_survivor, doctest AI evidence variants define closed nested properties, and F-033 is deferred to explicit preview backlog instead of the administrative audit task.

Completed task 068 before project bootstrap: aligned task 025 scope with inserted tasks 061-067, made preview mutators explicit backlog in the roadmap, clarified doctest mutation summary partitions and survivor AI source_case/mutation_case evidence, aligned pre-041 pipeline artifact wording, and defined report internal_error run.error schema/test ownership.
